---
title: "104c_final"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## 

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(kableExtra)

fA     <- function(t, y)  y - t^2 + 1
fA_dt  <- function(t, y) -2*t
fA_dy  <- function(t, y)  1
exactA <- function(t)    (t + 1)^2 - 0.5 * exp(t)

fB     <- function(t, y)  2 * y
fB_dt  <- function(t, y)  0
fB_dy  <- function(t, y)  2
exactB <- function(t)     exp(2 * t)

fC     <- function(t, y) -y + cos(t)
fC_dt  <- function(t, y) -sin(t)
fC_dy  <- function(t, y) -1
exactC <- function(t)    (cos(t) + sin(t)) / 2


euler <- function(f, t0, y0, tf, h) {
  ts <- seq(t0, tf, by = h)
  ys <- numeric(length(ts)); ys[1] <- y0
  for (i in seq_along(ts[-1]))
    ys[i+1] <- ys[i] + h * f(ts[i], ys[i])
  list(t = ts, y = ys)
}

taylor2 <- function(f, ft, fy, t0, y0, tf, h) {
  ts <- seq(t0, tf, by = h)
  ys <- numeric(length(ts)); ys[1] <- y0
  for (i in seq_along(ts[-1])) {
    T2 <- f(ts[i], ys[i]) + h/2*(ft(ts[i], ys[i]) + fy(ts[i], ys[i])*f(ts[i], ys[i]))
    ys[i+1] <- ys[i] + h * T2
  }
  list(t = ts, y = ys)
}

midpoint <- function(f, t0, y0, tf, h) {
  ts <- seq(t0, tf, by = h)
  ys <- numeric(length(ts)); ys[1] <- y0
  for (i in seq_along(ts[-1])) {
    k1 <- f(ts[i], ys[i])
    k2 <- f(ts[i] + h/2, ys[i] + h/2*k1)
    ys[i+1] <- ys[i] + h * k2
  }
  list(t = ts, y = ys)
}

heun <- function(f, t0, y0, tf, h) {
  ts <- seq(t0, tf, by = h)
  ys <- numeric(length(ts)); ys[1] <- y0
  for (i in seq_along(ts[-1])) {
    k1 <- f(ts[i], ys[i])
    k2 <- f(ts[i] + h, ys[i] + h*k1)
    ys[i+1] <- ys[i] + h/2*(k1 + k2)
  }
  list(t = ts, y = ys)
}

rk4 <- function(f, t0, y0, tf, h) {
  ts <- seq(t0, tf, by = h)
  ys <- numeric(length(ts)); ys[1] <- y0
  for (i in seq_along(ts[-1])) {
    k1 <- f(ts[i],       ys[i])
    k2 <- f(ts[i] + h/2, ys[i] + h/2*k1)
    k3 <- f(ts[i] + h/2, ys[i] + h/2*k2)
    k4 <- f(ts[i] + h,   ys[i] + h*k3)
    ys[i+1] <- ys[i] + h/6*(k1 + 2*k2 + 2*k3 + k4)
  }
  list(t = ts, y = ys)
}

adams_bashforth <- function(f, t0, y0, tf, h) {
  startup <- rk4(f, t0, y0, t0 + 3*h, h)
  ts <- startup$t; ys <- startup$y
  fs <- sapply(seq_along(ts), function(i) f(ts[i], ys[i]))
  t_cur <- ts[length(ts)]
  while (t_cur < tf - 1e-12) {
    n  <- length(ys)
    yn <- ys[n] + h/24*(55*fs[n] - 59*fs[n-1] + 37*fs[n-2] - 9*fs[n-3])
    t_cur <- t_cur + h
    ts <- c(ts, t_cur); ys <- c(ys, yn); fs <- c(fs, f(t_cur, yn))
  }
  list(t = ts, y = ys)
}

adams_moulton <- function(f, t0, y0, tf, h) {
  startup <- rk4(f, t0, y0, t0 + 3*h, h)
  ts <- startup$t; ys <- startup$y
  fs <- sapply(seq_along(ts), function(i) f(ts[i], ys[i]))
  t_cur <- ts[length(ts)]
  while (t_cur < tf - 1e-12) {
    n  <- length(ys)
    yp <- ys[n] + h/24*(55*fs[n] - 59*fs[n-1] + 37*fs[n-2] - 9*fs[n-3])
    t_cur <- t_cur + h
    fp <- f(t_cur, yp)
    yc <- ys[n] + h/24*(9*fp + 19*fs[n] - 5*fs[n-1] + fs[n-2])
    ts <- c(ts, t_cur); ys <- c(ys, yc); fs <- c(fs, f(t_cur, yc))
  }
  list(t = ts, y = ys)
}

pred_corr <- function(f, t0, y0, tf, h) {
  startup <- rk4(f, t0, y0, t0 + 2*h, h)
  ts <- startup$t; ys <- startup$y
  fs <- sapply(seq_along(ts), function(i) f(ts[i], ys[i]))
  t_cur <- ts[length(ts)]
  while (t_cur < tf - 1e-12) {
    n  <- length(ys)
    yp <- ys[n] + h/12*(23*fs[n] - 16*fs[n-1] + 5*fs[n-2])
    t_cur <- t_cur + h
    fp <- f(t_cur, yp)
    yc <- ys[n] + h/12*(5*fp + 8*fs[n] - fs[n-1])
    ts <- c(ts, t_cur); ys <- c(ys, yc); fs <- c(fs, f(t_cur, yc))
  }
  list(t = ts, y = ys)
}

run_all <- function(f, ft, fy, exact, t0, y0, tf, h) {
  list(
    Euler             = euler(f, t0, y0, tf, h),
    Taylor2           = taylor2(f, ft, fy, t0, y0, tf, h),
    Midpoint          = midpoint(f, t0, y0, tf, h),
    "Heun's"          = heun(f, t0, y0, tf, h),
    RK4               = rk4(f, t0, y0, tf, h),
    "Adams-Bashforth" = adams_bashforth(f, t0, y0, tf, h),
    "Adams-Moulton"   = adams_moulton(f, t0, y0, tf, h),
    "Pred-Corrector"  = pred_corr(f, t0, y0, tf, h)
  )
}


METHOD_COLORS <- c(
  "Euler"           = "#1B9E77",
  "Taylor2"         = "#D95F02",
  "Midpoint"        = "#7570B3",
  "Heun's"          = "#E7298A",
  "RK4"             = "#66A61E",
  "Adams-Bashforth" = "#E6AB02",
  "Adams-Moulton"   = "#A6761D",
  "Pred-Corrector"  = "#666666"
)


plot_solutions <- function(res, exact, tf, title, h) {
  t_fine   <- seq(min(res[[1]]$t), tf, length.out = 500)
  df_exact <- data.frame(t = t_fine, y = exact(t_fine), Method = "Exact")
  df_num   <- do.call(rbind, lapply(names(res), function(nm)
    data.frame(t = res[[nm]]$t, y = res[[nm]]$y, Method = nm)))
  df <- rbind(df_exact, df_num)
  df$Method <- factor(df$Method, levels = c("Exact", names(res)))
  cols <- c("Exact" = "black", METHOD_COLORS[names(res)])
  ltys <- setNames(
    c("solid", "longdash", "dotted", "twodash", "dashed",
      "dotdash", "longdash", "dotted", "twodash"),
    c("Exact", names(res))
  )
  ggplot(df, aes(x = t, y = y, color = Method, linetype = Method)) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 0.7) +
    scale_color_manual(values = cols) +
    scale_linetype_manual(values = ltys) +
    labs(title = paste0(title, "  (h = ", h, ")"), x = "t", y = "y") +
    theme_bw(base_size = 10) +
    guides(color = guide_legend(ncol = 1))
}

plot_errors <- function(res, exact, title, h) {
  df <- do.call(rbind, lapply(names(res), function(nm) {
    ts <- res[[nm]]$t
    data.frame(t = ts, error = abs(exact(ts) - res[[nm]]$y), Method = nm)
  }))
  df$Method <- factor(df$Method, levels = names(res))
  ggplot(df, aes(x = t, y = error + 1e-16, color = Method)) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 0.7) +
    scale_y_log10() +
    scale_color_manual(values = METHOD_COLORS[names(res)]) +
    labs(title = paste0(title, "  (h = ", h, ")"),
         x = "t", y = "|Error| (log scale)") +
    theme_bw(base_size = 10)
}


error_df <- function(res, exact, step = 2) {
  ts  <- res$Euler$t
  idx <- seq(1, length(ts), by = step)
  df  <- data.frame(t = round(ts[idx], 3), Exact = round(exact(ts[idx]), 6))
  for (nm in names(res))
    df[[nm]] <- formatC(abs(exact(ts[idx]) - res[[nm]]$y[idx]),
                        format = "e", digits = 2)
  df
}

max_error_df <- function(res_list, exact, h_vals) {
  nms <- names(res_list[[1]])
  rows <- lapply(nms, function(nm) {
    errs <- sapply(res_list, function(res) max(abs(exact(res[[nm]]$t) - res[[nm]]$y)))
    c(Method = nm, setNames(formatC(errs, format = "e", digits = 3),
                            paste0("h = ", h_vals)))
  })
  as.data.frame(do.call(rbind, rows), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
}

tbl <- function(df, cap) {
  df |>
    kable(format = "html", caption = cap) |>
    kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "bordered"),
                  full_width = FALSE, font_size = 13) |>
    row_spec(0, bold = TRUE, color = "white", background = "#2C3E50")
}


```

A

```{r}
resA02  <- run_all(fA, fA_dt, fA_dy, exactA, 0, 0.5, 2, 0.20)
resA01  <- run_all(fA, fA_dt, fA_dy, exactA, 0, 0.5, 2, 0.10)
resA005 <- run_all(fA, fA_dt, fA_dy, exactA, 0, 0.5, 2, 0.05)

plot_solutions(resA01, exactA, 2, "Problem A: Solutions", 0.1)
plot_errors(resA01, exactA, "Problem A: Absolute Errors", 0.1)
tbl(error_df(resA02, exactA, step = 1), "Problem A: Absolute Errors (h = 0.2)")
tbl(error_df(resA01, exactA, step = 1), "Problem A: Absolute Errors (h = 0.1)")
tbl(error_df(resA005, exactA, step = 2), "Problem A: Absolute Errors (h = 0.05)")
tbl(max_error_df(list(resA02, resA01, resA005), exactA, c(0.2, 0.1, 0.05)),
    "Problem A: Maximum Global Error Summary")

```

B

```{r}
resB02  <- run_all(fB, fB_dt, fB_dy, exactB, 0, 1, 2, 0.20)
resB01  <- run_all(fB, fB_dt, fB_dy, exactB, 0, 1, 2, 0.10)
resB005 <- run_all(fB, fB_dt, fB_dy, exactB, 0, 1, 2, 0.05)

plot_solutions(resB01, exactB, 2, "Problem B: Solutions", 0.1)
plot_errors(resB01, exactB, "Problem B: Absolute Errors", 0.1)
tbl(error_df(resB02, exactB, step = 1), "Problem B: Absolute Errors (h = 0.2)")
tbl(error_df(resB01, exactB, step = 1), "Problem B: Absolute Errors (h = 0.1)")
tbl(error_df(resB005, exactB, step = 2), "Problem B: Absolute Errors (h = 0.05)")
tbl(max_error_df(list(resB02, resB01, resB005), exactB, c(0.2, 0.1, 0.05)),
    "Problem B: Maximum Global Error Summary")
```

C

```{r}
tf_C    <- 4 * pi
resC02  <- run_all(fC, fC_dt, fC_dy, exactC, 0, 0.5, tf_C, 0.20)
resC01  <- run_all(fC, fC_dt, fC_dy, exactC, 0, 0.5, tf_C, 0.10)
resC005 <- run_all(fC, fC_dt, fC_dy, exactC, 0, 0.5, tf_C, 0.05)

plot_solutions(resC01, exactC, tf_C, "Problem C: Solutions", 0.1)
plot_errors(resC01, exactC, "Problem C: Absolute Errors", 0.1)
tbl(error_df(resC02, exactC, step = 2), "Problem C: Absolute Errors (h = 0.2)")
tbl(error_df(resC01, exactC, step = 2), "Problem C: Absolute Errors (h = 0.1)")
tbl(error_df(resC005, exactC, step = 4), "Problem C: Absolute Errors (h = 0.05)")
tbl(max_error_df(list(resC02, resC01, resC005), exactC, c(0.2, 0.1, 0.05)),
    "Problem C: Maximum Global Error Summary")
```
